name: Statutory Non-Employee Status for Direct Sellers

eligibility.description: Applies to persons selling consumer products or delivering newspapers where pay is based on output/sales and a written non-employee contract exists.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Classifies direct sellers and newspaper distributors as independent contractors, exempting the hiring entity from FICA, FUTA, and income tax withholding.
